macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Hit Fresh Record Highs
items.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq closed at new record highs on Wednesday, driven by corporate developments and optimism over a potential end to the Iran war. Gains were led by Tesla surging over 7% on software updates and AI chip progress.

items.title: S&P 500 Closes at Record High as US-Iran Ceasefire Continues
items.summary: The S&P 500 reached a record high amid ongoing US-Iran ceasefire developments, with stocks soaring and oil prices plunging following the agreement.

items.title: March CPI Shows 0.9% Spike in Consumer Prices Led by Energy
items.summary: US CPI for March rose 0.9% month-over-month, pushing year-over-year inflation to 3.3% from 2.4%, primarily due to a 10.9% jump in energy prices amid Middle East tensions.

items.title: US Import Prices Rise 0.8% in March on Fuel Cost Surge
items.summary: US import prices increased 0.8% month-over-month in March, with fuel prices jumping 2.9% due to higher petroleum costs; year-over-year gain hit 2.1%, the strongest since December 2024.

items.title: WTI Crude Swings Around $92 as Middle East Conflict Persists
items.summary: WTI crude futures fluctuated around $92 per barrel amid volatility from Middle East developments, with US military halting traffic to Iranian ports but some vessels still transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Fed Beige Book: Economic Activity Stable Amid Middle East Uncertainty
items.summary: Federal Reserve Beige Book reports slight to modest economic growth in most districts, with stable employment and moderate price rises driven by energy; Middle East conflict cited as major uncertainty factor.

items.title: Snapchat Owner Cuts 16% of Global Staff
items.summary: Snap Inc., owner of Snapchat, announced layoffs of 16% of its global workforce in the latest round of job cuts.

items.title: 7-Eleven Plans to Close Hundreds of North American Stores
items.summary: 7-Eleven expects to shutter hundreds of stores in North America this year amid ongoing business adjustments.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Faces $257M in Liquidations Over 24 Hours, Longs Hit Hardest
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw $257 million in liquidations in the past 24 hours, with long positions accounting for $163 million and Bitcoin and Ethereum leading at $55.6 million and $43.6 million respectively. Over 129,536 traders were affected, including a single $6.9 million loss on Hyperliquid.

items.title: Bitcoin Rally Stalls Below $76,000 Amid $152M Long Position Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin's price rally halted below $76,000 as institutional demand weakened, triggering over $152 million in long position liquidations, with BTC accounting for more than $50 million. This reflects fading momentum in the ongoing market uptrend.

items.title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Price Surges 250% in a Day, Hits $10 Amid Supply Concerns
items.summary: RaveDAO's token RAVE pumped over 250% on April 13, 2026, reaching a $2.5 billion market cap and surpassing $10, but blockchain data reveals insiders control about 98% of the total supply. The token has gained over 3,400% in the past seven days.

items.title: Sei (SEI) Surges Over 10% as Gas-Free Swaps Go Live
items.summary: Sei token rose more than 10% following the launch of gas-free swaps on April 1, 2026, enhancing platform accessibility. Current price stands at $0.0558 with a $375 million market cap.

items.title: Tether Adds $70 Million in Bitcoin to Reserves, Holdings Exceed 97,000 BTC
items.summary: Tether bolstered its reserves by adding $70 million worth of Bitcoin, pushing total holdings above 97,000 BTC. This move underscores ongoing treasury diversification into cryptocurrency.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Releases Gemini Subagents, Native Mac App, New TTS Model, and API Billing Updates
items.summary: Google launched Gemini subagents outperforming Claude and OpenAI Agents 2.0, along with a native Mac app, new text-to-speech model, Gemini CLI enhancements, and prepay billing for the Gemini API. These updates mark a significant push in agentic AI capabilities.

items.title: OpenAI Updates Agents SDK with Sandboxing and New Harness
items.summary: OpenAI introduced sandbox execution and a more capable harness to its Agents SDK, improving agent logic reliability and safety. This follows Google's agent advancements.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Managed Agents in Public Beta and Expands Compute Partnerships
items.summary: Anthropic released Claude Managed Agents publicly, Claude for Word, and details on Claude Mythos Preview; they also expanded Google/Broadcom partnership for gigawatts of compute, with run rate surging to $30B. Reports highlight potential degradation in Claude Opus 4.6 performance.

items.title: Ramp AI Unveils Internal Productivity Suite and Multi-Agent Token Savings Research
items.summary: Ramp launched Glass, its AI productivity suite, and published a Latent Briefing paper demonstrating 31% token savings in multi-agent systems. This underscores trends in enterprise AI efficiency.

items.title: MiniMax Ships MMX CLI and Open-Sources M2.7 Model
items.summary: MiniMax released MMX CLI tool and open-sourced its M2.7 model, advancing accessible AI development. GLM-5.1 also entered Code Arena's top 3.

items.title: Wispr Flow Raises $81M at $700M Valuation for Voice-to-Text AI
items.summary: AI startup Wispr Flow, evolving from brain-computer interfaces to voice-to-text software, secured $81M funding at a $700M valuation amid rapid 30-50% monthly growth in AI companies.

items.title: Harness Engineering Emerges as Key to AI Agent Performance
items.summary: Harness engineering—providing context, memory, and safe execution—powers advances like Blitzcy's 66.5% on SWE-bench Pro, surpassing GPT-5.4, signaling a shift from prompts to production infrastructure.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Confirms June 2025 Wave 1 Lineup
items.summary: Microsoft has unveiled the full list of games coming to Xbox Game Pass in the first wave of June 2025 ahead of the Xbox Games Showcase.

items.title: Nioh 3 Announced and Available Now
items.summary: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo announced Nioh 3 during Sony’s State of Play showcase for June, allowing soulslike fans to play it immediately.

items.title: Bloodstained Sequel The Scarlet Engagement Revealed
items.summary: Developer ArtPlay revealed the latest entry in the Bloodstained series, The Scarlet Engagement, during the June PlayStation State of Play.

items.title: Final Fantasy, Metal Gear Solid, Digimon & More at June 2025 State of Play
items.summary: The June PlayStation State of Play featured big reveals including a remaster of Final Fantasy Tactics, a release date for Silent Hill f, and more franchise updates.

items.title: Xbox Schedules Summer Showcase and Gears of War: E-Day Direct for June 7
items.summary: Xbox has announced its summer gaming showcase along with a dedicated Gears of War: E-Day Direct on June 7.

items.title: Super Mario Galaxy Movie Tops 2026 Premiere Box Office
items.summary: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie achieved the highest-grossing premiere of 2026, tracking slightly behind its predecessor The Super Mario Bros. Movie.

items.title: First Three Resident Evil Titles and Breath of Fire IV Now on Steam
items.summary: The original versions of the first three Resident Evil games and Breath of Fire IV are now available on PC via Steam.

items.title: No More Heroes Developer Announces New Ultraviolent Sci-Fi Game
items.summary: Suda51 and Grasshopper Manufacture revealed a new over-the-top action game blending No More Heroes and Dead Rising vibes.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Reveals ‘Force of Law’ Warbond
items.summary: Helldivers 2 announced a new Force of Law Warbond, allowing players to access fresh content in the cooperative shooter.

items.title: Nintendo Releases Update for Original Switch Ahead of Switch 2 Launch
items.summary: Nintendo issued system update 20.1.1 for the original Switch, fixing issues just days before the Switch 2 launches on June 5.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
